---
title: Semantic Alerts
lang: en
md2pdf:
  cover: false
  toc: false
---

> [!NOTE]
> Notes provide useful context.

> [!TIP]
> Tips suggest an efficient path.

> [!IMPORTANT]
> Important details affect the result.

> [!WARNING]
> Warnings identify likely failure.

> [!CAUTION]
> Cautions identify serious consequences.

> [!UNKNOWN]
> Unknown markers remain ordinary quotations.
